Off Calendar Dec-31-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Vivian Leung Lerche, Esq. 415-680-5731 specially appearing for Plaintiff.
Rexy Jacobs, 415-572-9878 Defendant in Pro Per

RULING - ARGUED. The Court informs the Defendant there is no Opposition filed. Defendant informs the Court he was out of work for a long time. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC's Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Of Motion.

Portfolio's motion for judgment on the pleadings is GRANTED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. No opposition filed. Judgment shall be entered forthwith.

Order and Judgment are signed.(see scanned order and Judgment for details)

Judge: Newton Lam, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR#6185, tonyvaughn@yahoo.com, Reported. =(302/NL)
